_comment: NODE-LEVEL schedule config for theo-portfolio's OWN BCOS docs (treats this repo like any other BCOS node). Live config is gitignored. Umbrella-level jobs live in umbrella-schedule-config.json. Edit manually or via schedule-tune skill.

dispatcher._comment: Informational only — the actual cron lives on the scheduled task (bcos-theo-portfolio). If you change the cron, update this hint.

index-health._about: Rebuild theo-portfolio's own document-index.md + scan for frontmatter/metadata/cross-ref issues.

daydream-lessons._about: Strategic reflection + lessons. Disabled — strategic reflection happens at the umbrella level via future portfolio-daydream.

audit-inbox._about: Deep CLEAR audit + inbox processing for theo-portfolio's own docs.

architecture-review._about: Architecture review. Disabled — portfolio internal architecture is stable.

wiki-stale-propagation._about: Run cadence: starts daily, tune down once stable. Cheap metadata-only check — fine to leave daily long-term. Scans wiki pages whose builds-on sources changed after last-reviewed and emits action items.

wiki-source-refresh._about: Run cadence: starts daily, tune down once stable. Steady state ~weekly (e.g. 'mon') — two-tier source-summary refresh: HEAD-only quick checks at stale_threshold_days/4, full refresh-must-rediscover at stale_threshold_days.

wiki-graveyard._about: Run cadence: starts daily, tune down once stable. Steady state monthly (e.g. '1st') — archive-candidate scan for stale/orphaned/expired wiki pages. Only whitelisted post-mortem expiry is auto-fixable.

wiki-coverage-audit._about: Run cadence: starts daily, tune down once stable. Steady state quarterly ('0 0 1 */3 *') — cross-zone coverage scan. Surfaces active data points without wiki explainers and wiki clusters missing from document-index as INFO.

auto-fix-audit._about: Run cadence: starts daily, tune down once stable. Steady state ~weekly (e.g. 'fri') — safety brake on the self-learning ladder. Surfaces amber cards when a learned rule reversal rate crosses 5% in 7 days. Recommend-only at v0.1.

lifecycle-sweep._about: Run cadence: starts daily, tune down once stable. Steady state ~weekly (e.g. 'fri') — classifier of active-zone docs against lifecycle-routing.yml. Surface-only for the first 2 weeks (default); flip lifecycle-routing.yml > global.surface_only=false after 0 false-positives confirmed to enable auto-routing.

wiki-canonical-drift._about: Run cadence: starts daily, tune down once stable. Mechanical scan — fine to leave daily long-term. Wiki captures whose numeric facts diverge from canonical docs whose last-updated is > 180 days. Emits wiki-canonical-drift-suggestion findings; never edits canonical docs. Schema 1.2 Class D — see job-wiki-canonical-drift.md.

wiki-failed-ingest._about: Run cadence: starts daily, tune down once stable. Cheap dead-letter scan — fine to leave daily long-term. Surfaces stuck queue.md URLs (default >14 days), source-summary files missing provenance.source, and wiki drafts with malformed/missing YAML frontmatter. Mechanical-only; never auto-fixes. See job-wiki-failed-ingest.md.

auto_fix._about: Fixes the dispatcher can apply without asking.

digest._about: Overwrites each run. Full history in .claude/hook_state/schedule-diary.jsonl. auto_commit=true: dispatcher commits generated artifacts when tree is clean outside the allowlist (see schedule-dispatcher Step 7b).
